name: dev-flows-plugin
description: Reusable Codex development workflows for context collection, change review, task implementation, commit creation, draft PRs, and Python navigation.

interface.shortDescription: Context collection, review, implementation, commit, draft PR, and Python navigation skills.
interface.longDescription: Dev Flows packages reusable local development workflows for collecting task context, reviewing local changes, reviewing PRs, implementing tasks through a validation loop, creating git commits, creating draft pull requests, and navigating Python code with lspyx.
defaultPrompt: Create a draft PR for this branch.
